_comment: Raw account_primary_category -> standardized public label. Applied by scripts/tracker/generate-static-accounts.py and scripts/gcc/generate-company-pages.mjs so the directory, filters, landing pages and company pages all show the same industry names. Unmapped values pass through unchanged. Pending Ranu's review: TTLH expansion and any further merges. The accounts section corrects per-company industry tags (Ranu's data-hygiene list) until fixed in the warehouse.
